title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce costs, and extend Claude's capabilities with web scraping, media generation, and model swapping. The video covers tools including Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, and others alongside Anthropic's built-in plugins.
